text:
Hypnosis Butterflies (サイミンチョウ, Saiminchou) are butterfly insects capable of performing a flight pattern that puts its prey to sleep which then serves as live food for its larvae. They reside in Milsy Wetlands. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 8 

Appearance

The Hypnosis Butterfly has the normal appearance of any old butterfly. 

Behavior

It flies in a pattern that puts its prey to sleep and uses the prey as live food for its larvae. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The Hypnosis Butterflies use their pattern of flight to hypnotize unsuspecting examinees, while they try and navigate through the marshlands. 

Trivia

Although the 2011 anime adaptation implies the hypnotic flight pattern just as it's described in the manga. It also suggests that the butterflies are capable of releasing scales (a kind of "hallucinogenic powder") which when breathed in causes the victim to hallucinate and soon after faint. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 5 (2011) The 1999 anime adaptation also suggests, but more slightly, that the butterflies' hypnotic ability works through its scales. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 8 (1999)
